description_long: This bird has a robust, medium-sized body covered in smooth, slate-gray feathers, with a slightly lighter gray head and neck. Its beak is strong, curved, and dark, typical of parrots, and the eyes are set forward, giving it a keen, intelligent expression. The wings and back are uniformly gray, while the tail feathers are a striking, vibrant red, providing a sharp contrast to the rest of the plumage. The legs are short and sturdy, likely gray or black, and the feet are adapted for perching. The overall feather pattern is solid with subtle gradients, and the bird's posture suggests alertness and awareness of its surroundings. This bird is commonly seen in urban parks or perched on structures, adding a splash of color to city environments.
description: A medium-sized, gray parrot with a curved beak and vivid red tail feathers, featuring smooth plumage and a sturdy build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bird, highlighting the gray body and bright red tail feathers.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizing the symmetrical red tail and the rounded back, with both wings folded close to the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the gray plumage and red tail, with the beak visible at the front.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, curved beak, and the smooth transition from the lighter gray head to the darker body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray body with a lighter gray head and bright red tail feathers
